scripts.build:chrome: cross-env TARGET=chrome BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-chrome tsc && cross-env TARGET=chrome BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-chrome vite build && cross-env BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-chrome vite build --config vite.background.config.ts
scripts.build:firefox: cross-env TARGET=firefox BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-firefox tsc && cross-env TARGET=firefox BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-firefox vite build && cross-env BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-firefox vite build --config vite.background.config.ts
scripts.watch:firefox: concurrently "cross-env TARGET=firefox BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-firefox vite build --watch" "cross-env TARGET=firefox BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-firefox vite build --watch --config vite.background.config.ts"
scripts.watch:chrome: concurrently "cross-env TARGET=chrome BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-chrome vite build --watch" "cross-env TARGET=chrome BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-chrome vite build --watch --config vite.background.config.ts"
